_meta.description: Boss encounters for Canon Engine RPG
_meta.note: Bosses use phases triggered at HP thresholds

phases.name: The Sentinel
phases.description: Malachar stands resolute, summoning skeletal minions to his aid.

phases.name: The Unbound
phases.description: Dark energy erupts from Malachar's armor. He discards his shield and unleashes necrotic fury.

phases.name: The Desperate
phases.description: Malachar's form begins to crumble. In desperation, he channels the crypt's death energy.

abilities.name: Death Scream
abilities.effect: DC 14 WIS save or Frightened for 2 turns

abilities.name: Final Strike
abilities.description: Used every other turn in phase 3

phases.enrage_effect: Instant kill attack if not defeated within 5 turns of phase 3

special_loot.name: Grave Key
special_loot.description: Opens the sealed passage to the Buried Throne

special_loot.name: Soul Shard
special_loot.description: A crystallized fragment of ancient necrotic power

dialogue.intro: You dare profane these halls? I am the keeper of what lies beneath... and you shall join my collection.
dialogue.phase_2: Enough! Feel the weight of a thousand burials!
dialogue.phase_3: Impossible... I will NOT be undone by mortals!
dialogue.defeat: The throne... will find... another keeper...
dialogue.player_death: Another soul for the crypt. Rise, and serve.

phases.name: The Observer
phases.description: Valdris watches from his throne, testing the intruders with shadow magic.

abilities.name: Mirror Shadows
abilities.effect: Creates 2 shadow clones with half HP

abilities.name: Darkness Aura
abilities.effect: All attacks against Valdris have disadvantage unless attacker is within 5ft

phases.name: The Warlord
phases.description: Valdris rises, wielding a blade of solidified shadow. He teleports between strikes.

abilities.name: Shadow Step
abilities.effect: Teleport up to 60ft to a shadow, attack with advantage

abilities.name: Umbral Cage
abilities.effect: Traps target in shadow sphere, DC 16 WIS save, 3d8 necrotic per turn trapped

phases.name: The Void Incarnate
phases.description: Valdris discards his form, becoming one with the shadow realm itself.

abilities.name: Reality Tear
abilities.effect: DC 17 CON save or Banished for 1 turn

abilities.name: Void Collapse
abilities.effect: DC 18 DEX save for half damage. One-time devastating attack.

special_loot.name: Crown of the Shadow King
special_loot.special: +3 INT, +3 CHA, resistance to all shadow damage, can cast Darkness 1/day

special_loot.name: Essence of the Shadow Realm
special_loot.description: Raw shadow energy made manifest. Incredibly rare and dangerous.

dialogue.intro: Ah, the living. How quaint that you walk so boldly into the domain of shadows. Let us see if your courage outlasts your light.
dialogue.phase_2: Enough games. You have earned the right to face me truly.
dialogue.phase_3: The void hungers! I am the darkness between stars, the silence at the end of all things!
dialogue.defeat: Light... so there is still light in this world... How... disappointing...
dialogue.player_death: Return to the light, little mortal. The shadows will be waiting.
